answers.reason: Audit anchor advanced after receiver verification
answers.notes: Verify that the appended audit entry is expected receiver-side verification activity and record the review.

answers.reason: Working notes and report edits require review
answers.notes: Review the working notes and report edits, then document why the investigation handoff can continue.
Confirm the redaction summary and document why the redacted evidence changes are acceptable before continuing.
Investigate the missing bundle, block the handoff, and request a corrected evidence package.
No remediation required; attach the clean regulated handoff review to the ticket.

answers.reason: Report checksum drift violates strict zero-drift policy
answers.notes: Block the handoff and ask the sender to resolve or justify the changed report before retrying.
No remediation required; record the zero-drift result and continue the handoff.
